title: Magic Season Decorative Glass Bottle - 9 fl oz. Potion Bottle (1 Set w/Glass Stopper)
description:
About this item
Classic Potion Design: Features an enchanting potion bottle shape, adding a magical touch to your decor.
Secure Glass Stopper: Includes a glass stopper with silicone rings for enhanced sealing, keeping contents secure.
Generous Capacity: Holds 260 ml (9 fl oz.), perfect for decorative liquids, craft materials, or unique items.
Compact Size: Height of 13.2 cm (5.2 inches) and a diameter of 9 cm (3.5 inches) make it a practical and stylish addition to any space.
Not for Drinking: This bottle is designed for decorative use only and is not suitable for drinking.
› See more product details
reviews_5s: This was the perfect vessel for my blessed oil. Now I can keep it on my dining room table. I love it.Searched for small ‘decanters’ for newly remodeled guest and primary bathrooms to hold mouthwash! Simple search, you think. To find something small and simple was time consuming. As always, Amazon came through.Comme sur la photoWill make a nice potion when I am dome with it youll see !Exactly as advertised.Bought this for my bfs Christmas gift. “365 reasons I love you” clearly I’m no where near done, but I wanted something simple that wasn’t basic like other glass jar types. I’m happy with it, solid, no issues, and a nice pop when you open the top (bonus points for that) just get it lol (it’s sitting on an iPad Pro for size reference)
